text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before the February Stakes, the first race of
Smart Falcon's victory declaration, she decides to
compete in the Kawasaki Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That means running two races back-to-back,
which she'll need tenacity to get through. She
heads to the track with a "whirly-whoo" cheer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some fans start to imagine her finding success
running internationally. Hearing this, Smart
Falcon becomes even more resolute.
